meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: How we collect, use and protect your personal information at SOMOS PASIÓN

intro.title: Introduction
intro.p1: At SOMOS PASIÓN we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains what information we collect when you visit our store or place an order, how we use it, and what rights you have over it.
intro.p2: By browsing the site or making a purchase, you accept the practices described in this policy.

dataCollection.title: Information We Collect
dataCollection.intro: We only collect the information necessary to process your order and deliver a good shopping experience:

items.identity: Contact details: name, surname, email and phone number.
items.shipping: Shipping and billing address: street, city, postal code and country.
items.payment: Payment details: processed directly and securely by Stripe. We do not store or have access to your full card numbers.
items.order: Order history: products purchased, amount, shipping status and related communications.
items.customization: Customization data: name and number of the dorsal you choose for your jersey.
items.technical: Technical data: IP address, browser type, device and usage information collected through cookies.

dataUsage.title: How We Use Your Information
dataUsage.intro: We use your data exclusively for the following purposes:

items.order: Processing and shipping your order, including product customization.
items.support: Handling your queries, returns and complaints.
items.improve: Analyzing site usage to improve our catalog and shopping experience.
items.marketing: Sending marketing communications, only if you have given your explicit consent.

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.intro: We process your data under the following legal bases provided by the GDPR:

items.contract: Performance of a contract: to process the order, payment and shipping.
items.consent: Consent: for sending marketing communications and non-essential cookies.
items.interest: Legitimate interest: to prevent fraud and improve the security of the site.

dataSharing.title: Sharing Data with Third Parties
dataSharing.intro: We do not sell your data. We only share it with the providers strictly necessary to deliver the service:

items.payment: Payment providers: Stripe processes payments in compliance with the PCI-DSS standard.
items.shipping: Shipping and logistics companies: they receive your shipping details solely to deliver your order.
items.hosting: Technology providers: web hosting, database and transactional email delivery.
items.legal: Competent authorities: when required by law.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content: We keep your data only for as long as strictly necessary to fulfill the purposes described. Order data will be retained for the periods required by tax and commercial regulations (up to 6 years). Data processed based on your consent will be kept until you withdraw it.

yourRights.title: Your Rights (GDPR)
yourRights.intro: As a user you have the following rights over your personal data:

rights.access: Access the personal data we hold about you.
rights.erasure: Request the deletion of your data when it is no longer necessary.
rights.portability: Receive your data in a structured and portable format.
rights.objection: Object to the processing of your data under certain circumstances.
rights.withdrawal: Withdraw your consent at any time, without retroactive effects.
rights.complaint: Lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority (in Spain, AEPD: www.aepd.es).

yourRights.contact: To exercise any of these rights you can write to us at:

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: We use first-party and third-party cookies for the operation of the site, usage analytics and, where applicable, advertising purposes. You can find the details in our Cookie Policy and manage your preferences from the consent banner.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this policy or want to exercise your rights, you can write to us at:

meta.title: Cookie Policy
meta.description: Learn about how we use cookies and tracking technologies

warning.title: Development Template - Configure Iubenda
warning.message: This is a basic template for development. For production, configure Iubenda to automatically generate and maintain a compliant Cookie Policy.

intro.title: What Are Cookies
intro.content: {companyName} uses cookies and similar tracking technologies to improve your experience, analyze usage, and for marketing purposes. This policy explains what cookies are, how we use them, and how you can control them.

necessary.title: Necessary Cookies
necessary.description: These cookies are essential for the website to function properly. They cannot be disabled.

items.session: Session cookies for authentication and account access
items.auth: Authentication tokens to keep you logged in securely
items.preferences: User preferences and settings (language, theme, etc.)

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies (Optional)
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website. We use this data to improve our service.

items.usage: Track which pages you visit and how you navigate the site
items.performance: Monitor site performance and identify technical issues

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies (Optional)
marketing.description: These cookies are used to show you relevant ads and measure campaign effectiveness. You can opt out at any time.

items.googleAds: Google Ads: Track ad conversions and campaign performance
items.metaPixel: Meta Pixel: Measure Facebook/Instagram ad effectiveness

manage.title: How to Manage Cookies
manage.content: You can control cookie preferences through our cookie consent banner. You can also block cookies through your browser settings, but this may affect site functionality.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us:

meta.title: Terms of Service
meta.description: Terms and conditions for using our service

warning.title: Review with Legal Professional
warning.message: These Terms have been generated with your company data. Review with a legal professional familiar with your jurisdiction before launch.

intro.title: Agreement to Terms
intro.content: By accessing or using {companyName}, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you disagree with any part of the terms, you may not access the service.

items.harm: Attempt to interfere with or compromise the system integrity or security
items.abuse: Abuse, harass, threaten, or intimidate other users
items.spam: Send unsolicited or unauthorized advertising or promotional material

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: In no event shall {companyName} be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including loss of profits, data, or other intangible losses.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify or replace these Terms at any time. If a revision is material, we will provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us:
contact.updatePrompt: ⚠️ Remember to update this contact information with your actual legal contact details before launching to production.

meta.title: Return Policy
meta.description: SOMOS PASIÓN return, cancellation and refund conditions

returns.title: Returns
returns.p1: SOMOS PASIÓN only accepts returns of new products, without any type of damage or signs of use, within a maximum period of 14 (fourteen) days after receiving the order. To proceed with the return, you must contact us by email. This email must contain the order number and the reference of the product you wish to return.
returns.p2: Once our team confirms the return, you must send the item to the indicated address within a maximum period of 14 (fourteen) days. Items for return must be sent directly to us.
returns.p3: We do not accept returns on the following items: personalized items.
returns.p4: If we receive returns that do not meet the above conditions, the customer will not be entitled to any refund.

cancellation.title: Order Cancellation
cancellation.content: Once an order has been confirmed, it will not be possible to cancel it. All confirmed orders go directly into the preparation and shipping process, so we cannot guarantee cancellation once the purchase has been completed.

refund.title: Refund Methods and Timelines
refund.content: SOMOS PASIÓN will make every effort to refund the customer within a maximum period of 14 (fourteen) days from the date the return arrives. In the case of cancelled orders (paid orders that have not yet been shipped), the maximum refund period is 14 (fourteen) days.

shippingCosts.title: Shipping Cost Refund
shippingCosts.content: The shipping costs for the order and the return will be borne by the customer.

unclaimed.title: Unclaimed Orders and Pick-up Point Deliveries
unclaimed.p1: In cases where a delivery attempt is made and the recipient is not available, the package may be redirected to a local pick-up point according to the carrier's procedures. If the customer decides not to collect the package at the designated pick-up point, SOMOS PASIÓN will not be held responsible for the non-collection of the order. In such circumstances, we have no obligation to reattempt delivery or issue a refund, unless the package is returned to us in its original condition by the postal service.
unclaimed.p2: SOMOS PASIÓN is not responsible at any time if customers do not receive their package because they have provided an incorrect address, without correctly indicating the street name, house number, plot and/or floor, postal code and country. Unfortunately, many customers do not indicate their address correctly. Our top priority is for our customers to receive their order as soon as possible.
